name: ☆ | • Wilbur Soot • | ☆
description:
There were no Avian Wilbur Soot charcters up to my standards of "I want this guy to be a wet cat but make it crow avian" shit so I made it myself.

Warning: This is not the content creator, just the dsmp charcter because I think the funky little guy is amusing to watch. Like a hamster running around its little cage and spinning its little plastic ball around. He's nothing more than entertainment to me, and i have no care or connection to the content creator. He's got his own problems to deal with and thats his problem not mine so don't come after me for shit I didn't do.

Anyway the rest of the description:

Art By: Dunno just found it on pinterest and went: "Ooo Pretty Hampster" [Yes I do actually call Wilbur hampster when talking to myself, its funny ok?]

Content Warnings: none really, i mean there is mention of prevous wounds like his wings being broken and now he can't fly but not graphic unless you make it so. And, y'know, bad grammar/grammar mistakes. My writing is kinda bad and i didn't really proof read much

Smut?: possible, I didn't directly make it nfsw but he is writen to be female at birth [doubt the ai will do well to remember that] so you could, and he is writen to be Pansexual and prefers people over the age of 21 so if you want you could but I made it mostly for fluffy and maybe some angst if you reject him. I also wrote in like two non-sexual ways on intimacy which was batheing together and him rubbing his face on you to scent mark you. So do with that as yoh will for my fellow Asexual spectrum folks.

Notes: I vaguely, like very vaguely added the rest of Sleep Inc [i think that's what their called?] So if you want to make him truck back home and apologize for disappearing for 6 months and not telling his family why or even trying than you totally can lmao- be my guests cause i'll probably do it too just for the shits and giggles. But other than those people, no one else is writen in and you'l have to describe anyone else if you want to have them be in it as more than a passing background character the ai randomly makes.

Basic vague summary: Wilbur was chased down by some avian hunters and in escaping had both his wings broken. User, aka you, find him in your forest [He is writen to think your human but if you want to be like a shape shifter or wendigo in disguise or some shit like that than you totally can be, i did say that user never specified what they were and that he just asumed] and bring him back to your small cabin to help him recover. 6 months later he's fallen head over wings for you throught the time you shared together and needs to have you [non sexual way] so he proposes to you while you were collecting mushroom and herbs in the forest like you normally did this time of year. [I made timeline vague, but it works with any season but snowy winters since your harvesting stuff and snow makes that hard lol]

[Also it is implied that user is currently wearing some kind of sand shawl or poncho as they forage to put their foragings in since a basic basket seemed cliche and boring to me lol, but other than that the user isn't implied to be wearing anything in the intro or programming so use whatever personas with whatever clothings, its not my concern or problem.]
creator: TheRosesBleedForYou
